# Wake Word

> Voice control for your editor with customizable wake word. Fully local, zero config.

## What it does
Wake Word is a VS Code extension that listens for spoken wake phrases and triggers editor commands. Say "Hey Claude" and Claude Code opens. Say "Hey Copilot" and GitHub Copilot Chat opens. Say "Computer" and the terminal focuses.

## Key facts
- Version: 0.5.1
- License: Apache 2.0
- Platforms: Windows, macOS, Linux
- Publisher: Analytics in Motion
- All speech processing is local (no cloud, no API keys)

## Links
- Website: https://wakeword.io
- Repository: https://github.com/analyticsinmotion/wake-word
- VS Code Marketplace: https://marketplace.visualstudio.com/items?itemName=analytics-in-motion.wake-word
- Open VSX: https://open-vsx.org/extension/analytics-in-motion/wake-word
